response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed systems experience with event-driven architectures and real-time data handling, as demonstrated at Dunnhumby and re:cinq. His involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, code generators) shows some exposure to agentic systems. However, his background lacks direct fintech experience, production multi-agent AI systems, or leadership in scaling teams to 30+ people. His fintech-relevant roles (Pricing at Optilyz, investment at RIDE) are tangential. The gap in agentic AI depth, fintech compliance, and executive leadership experience lowers the overall fit.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture expertise (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Experience with AI-agent tooling and developer infrastructure (re:cinq, MCP)
Proven track record in scaling engineering processes (TDD, CI/CD, team leadership at Altom)
concerns: Limited direct production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments
No demonstrated fintech infrastructure expertise (e.g., real-time credit risk, working capital)
Lacks executive leadership scaling teams to 30+ in a venture-backed scale-up
